modules.name: hawk_sdk.api.system.service
documentation:
@description: Service layer for processing and normalizing System data.
@author: Rithwik Babu

classes.name: hawk_sdk.api.system.service.SystemService

methods.name: hawk_sdk.api.system.service.SystemService.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the service with a repository.

```
param repository

An instance of SystemRepository for data access.
```

methods.name: hawk_sdk.api.system.service.SystemService.get_hawk_ids
documentation:
Fetches and normalizes hawk IDs into a pandas DataFrame.

```
param tickers

A list of specific tickers to filter by.

return

A pandas DataFrame containing the normalized hawk ID data.
```

methods.name: hawk_sdk.api.system.service.SystemService._normalize_data
documentation:
Converts raw data into a normalized pandas DataFrame.

```
param data

An iterator over raw data rows.

return

A pandas DataFrame containing normalized data.
```
Service class for System business logic.

modules.name: hawk_sdk.api.system.repository
documentation:
@description: Repository layer for fetching System data from BigQuery.
@author: Rithwik Babu

classes.name: hawk_sdk.api.system.repository.SystemRepository

methods.name: hawk_sdk.api.system.repository.SystemRepository.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the repository with a BigQuery client.

```
param bq_client

An instance of BigQuery Client.

param environment

The environment to fetch data from (e.g., 'production', 'development').
```

methods.name: hawk_sdk.api.system.repository.SystemRepository.fetch_hawk_ids
documentation:
Fetches hawk_ids for the given list of tickers from BigQuery.

```
param tickers

A list of ticker strings to filter by.

return

An iterator over raw data rows.
```
Repository for accessing System data.

modules.name: hawk_sdk.api.futures.main
documentation:
@description: Datasource API for Hawk Global Futures data access and export functions.
@author: Rithwik Babu

classes.name: hawk_sdk.api.futures.main.Futures

methods.name: hawk_sdk.api.futures.main.Futures.__init__
documentation: Initializes the Futures datasource with required configurations.

methods.name: hawk_sdk.api.futures.main.Futures.get_ohlcvo
documentation:
Fetch open, high, low, close, volume, and open interest data for the given date range and hawk_ids.

```
param start_date

%The start date for the data query (YYYY-MM-DD).

param end_date

The end date for the data query (YYYY-MM-DD).

param interval

The interval for the data query (e.g., '1d', '1h', '1m').

param hawk_ids

A list of specific hawk_ids to filter by.

return

A hawk DataObject containing the data.
```

methods.name: hawk_sdk.api.futures.main.Futures.get_snapshot
documentation:
Fetch snapshot data for the specified timestamp and hawk_ids.

```
param timestamp

The timestamp for the data query (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).

param hawk_ids

A list of specific hawk_ids to filter by.

return

A hawk DataObject containing the snapshot data.
```
Datasource API for fetching Futures data.

modules.name: hawk_sdk.api.futures.service
documentation:
@description: Service layer for processing and normalizing Futures data.
@author: Rithwik Babu

classes.name: hawk_sdk.api.futures.service.FuturesService

methods.name: hawk_sdk.api.futures.service.FuturesService.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the service with a repository.

```
param repository

An instance of FuturesRepository for data access.
```

methods.name: hawk_sdk.api.futures.service.FuturesService.get_ohlcvo
documentation:
Fetches and normalizes data into a pandas DataFrame.

```
param start_date

The start date for the data query (YYYY-MM-DD).

param end_date

The end date for the data query (YYYY-MM-DD).

param interval

The interval for the data query (e.g., '1d', '1h', '1m').

param hawk_ids

A list of specific hawk_ids to filter by.

return

A pandas DataFrame containing the normalized data.
```

methods.name: hawk_sdk.api.futures.service.FuturesService.get_snapshot
documentation:
Fetches snapshot data and normalizes it into a pandas DataFrame.

```
param timestamp

The timestamp for the data query (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).

param hawk_ids

A list of specific hawk_ids to filter by.

return

A pandas DataFrame containing the normalized snapshot data.
```

methods.name: hawk_sdk.api.futures.service.FuturesService._normalize_data
documentation:
Converts raw data into a normalized pandas DataFrame.

```
param data

An iterator over raw data rows.

return

A pandas DataFrame containing normalized data.
```
Service class for Futures business logic.

modules.name: hawk_sdk.core.common.base_enum
documentation:
@description: Base enum class.
@author: Rithwik Babu

classes.name: hawk_sdk.core.common.base_enum.BaseEnum
documentation:
Base enum class used by all enum classes.

Note: Inheriting from str is necessary to correctly serialize output of enum

modules.name: hawk_sdk.api.futures.repository
documentation:
@description: Repository layer for fetching Futures data from BigQuery.
@author: Rithwik Babu

classes.name: hawk_sdk.api.futures.repository.FuturesRepository

methods.name: hawk_sdk.api.futures.repository.FuturesRepository.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the repository with a BigQuery client.

```
param bq_client

An instance of BigQuery Client.

param environment

The environment to fetch data from (e.g., 'production', 'development').
```

methods.name: hawk_sdk.api.futures.repository.FuturesRepository.fetch_ohlcvo
documentation: Fetches raw OHLCVO data from BigQuery for the given date range and hawk_ids using query parameters.

methods.name: hawk_sdk.api.futures.repository.FuturesRepository.fetch_snapshot
documentation: Fetches the most recent snapshot data from BigQuery for the given time and hawk_ids.
Repository for accessing Futures raw data.

modules.name: hawk_sdk.core.common.data_object
documentation:
@description: Data Object class to handle output transformations.
@author: Rithwik Babu

methods.name: hawk_sdk.core.common.data_object.DataObject.to_df
documentation:
Exports data to a pandas DataFrame.

```
return

pd.Dataframe
```

methods.name: hawk_sdk.core.common.data_object.DataObject.to_csv
documentation:
Exports data to an Excel file.

```
param file_name

The name of the output Excel file.

return

None
```

methods.name: hawk_sdk.core.common.data_object.DataObject.to_xlsx
documentation:
Exports data to an Excel file.

```
param file_name

The name of the output Excel file.

return

None
```

methods.name: hawk_sdk.core.common.data_object.DataObject.show
documentation:
Print the first n rows of the data.

```
param n

Number of rows to print.

return

None, prints the head of the data.
```
